requirement_topic.en: ANATEL Label Requirements and In-Country Procurador (Authorised Representative) for Foreign Manufacturers
requirement_topic.zh: ANATEL标签要求及外国制造商的境内授权代理人（Procurador）
requirement_topic.zht: ANATEL標籤要求及外國製造商的境內授權代理人（Procurador）

summary.en: All devices that have obtained ANATEL homologation must display the ANATEL certification label on the product. The label must include: the ANATEL logo; the unique ANATEL homologation number assigned upon certification; and any other information required by applicable ANATEL resolutions. Product information on the label must generally appear in Portuguese. For foreign manufacturers without a legal entity in Brazil, ANATEL requires the appointment of a Brazil-registered procurador (in-country authorised representative or legal representative). The procurador is responsible for submitting the homologation application on behalf of the manufacturer, maintaining the product certification, responding to regulatory inquiries, and ensuring ongoing compliance. Without a valid procurador registration, a foreign manufacturer cannot obtain or maintain ANATEL homologation. The procurador must be a Brazilian legal entity or individual registered with ANATEL. Requirements for procurador appointment and responsibilities are set out in ANATEL resolutions.
summary.zh: 所有取得ANATEL型式认可的设备，均须在产品上标注ANATEL认证标签。标签须包含：ANATEL标志；认证时分配的唯一ANATEL型式认可编号；以及适用ANATEL决议要求的其他信息。标签上的产品信息通常须以葡萄牙语显示。对于在巴西无法律实体的外国制造商，ANATEL要求指定在巴西注册的授权代理人（procurador，即境内授权代表或法定代表人）。授权代理人负责代表制造商提交型式认可申请、维护产品认证、回应监管查询，并确保持续合规。未经有效授权代理人注册，外国制造商无法取得或维持ANATEL型式认可。授权代理人须为在ANATEL注册的巴西法律实体或个人。授权代理人的委任要求和职责由ANATEL决议规定。
summary.zht: 所有取得ANATEL型式認可的裝置，均須在產品上標注ANATEL認證標籤。標籤須包含：ANATEL標誌；認證時分配的唯一ANATEL型式認可編號；以及適用ANATEL決議要求的其他信息。標籤上的產品信息通常須以葡萄牙語顯示。對於在巴西無法律實體的外國製造商，ANATEL要求指定在巴西註冊的授權代理人（procurador，即境內授權代表或法定代表人）。授權代理人負責代表製造商提交型式認可申請、維護產品認證、回應監管查詢，並確保持續合規。未經有效授權代理人註冊，外國製造商無法取得或維持ANATEL型式認可。授權代理人須為在ANATEL註冊的巴西法律實體或個人。授權代理人的委任要求和職責由ANATEL決議規定。

standards_or_laws: ANATEL Resolution 242/2000 and subsequent amending resolutions — product labelling and procurador requirements
ANATEL Atos de Homologação — product-specific acts governing label and homologation number use
Brazilian consumer labelling requirements — product information in Portuguese
Lei 9.472/1997 (General Telecommunications Law) — legal basis for ANATEL regulatory requirements

summary.en: In China, products subject to CCC certification must display the CCC mark on the product and packaging. CCC labels must be sourced from CNCA-authorised suppliers. Chinese product information is typically in Simplified Chinese. Foreign manufacturers exporting to China often work through Chinese importers or distributors who bear regulatory responsibility. For SRRC/NRA type approval, the approved entity is typically the manufacturer or their China-registered representative. There is no direct equivalent of the Brazilian procurador system in China's regulatory framework, although Chinese importers and distributors commonly assume compliance and labelling obligations.
summary.zh: 在中国，须取得CCC认证的产品必须在产品和包装上标注CCC标志。CCC标签须从CNCA授权供应商处获取。中国产品信息通常以简体中文显示。向中国出口的外国制造商通常通过承担监管责任的中国进口商或经销商开展业务。就SRRC/NRA型号核准而言，被核准主体通常为制造商或其在中国注册的代表。中国监管框架中无巴西授权代理人（procurador）制度的直接对应机制，但中国进口商和经销商通常承担合规和标签义务。
summary.zht: 在中國，須取得CCC認證的產品必須在產品和包裝上標注CCC標誌。CCC標籤須從CNCA授權供應商處獲取。中國產品信息通常以簡體中文顯示。向中國出口的外國製造商通常通過承擔監管責任的中國進口商或經銷商開展業務。就SRRC/NRA型號核准而言，被核准主體通常為製造商或其在中國註冊的代表。中國監管框架中無巴西授權代理人（procurador）制度的直接對應機制，但中國進口商和經銷商通常承擔合規和標籤義務。

standards_or_laws: CCC mark requirements — CNCA rules on CCC mark sourcing, application, and labelling
SRRC/NRA type approval certificate — approved entity and labelling requirements for radio transmitters in China
PRC Product Quality Law — general product labelling and quality requirements

gap.en: Chinese CCC mark and SRRC approval do not satisfy ANATEL label requirements. The ANATEL homologation number and ANATEL logo must appear on the product label, and product information must be in Portuguese. Foreign manufacturers must appoint and register a Brazil-registered procurador with ANATEL before applying for homologation. The procurador relationship must be maintained for the life of the product certification. This is a structural compliance step with no FCC or CE equivalent and represents a significant operational requirement for Chinese exporters entering the Brazil market.
gap.zh: 中国CCC标志和SRRC核准不满足ANATEL标签要求。ANATEL型式认可编号和ANATEL标志须标注于产品标签，且产品信息须以葡萄牙语显示。外国制造商在申请型式认可前，须在ANATEL注册并委托巴西授权代理人（procurador）。授权代理人关系须在产品认证有效期内持续维持。这是一项结构性合规步骤，FCC或CE体系中无对应要求，对进入巴西市场的中国出口商而言，是一项重要的运营要求。
gap.zht: 中國CCC標誌和SRRC核准不滿足ANATEL標籤要求。ANATEL型式認可編號和ANATEL標誌須標注於產品標籤，且產品信息須以葡萄牙語顯示。外國製造商在申請型式認可前，須在ANATEL註冊並委託巴西授權代理人（procurador）。授權代理人關係須在產品認證有效期內持續維持。這是一項結構性合規步驟，FCC或CE體系中無對應要求，對進入巴西市場的中國出口商而言，是一項重要的運營要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ANATEL label with homologation number and ANATEL logo required on product; Brazil-registered procurador required for foreign manufacturers before applying for ANATEL homologation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC mark required on product for CCC-certified products; SRRC certificate number required on radio products; labelling in Simplified Chinese required

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brazil requires the ANATEL homologation number and ANATEL logo on the product label, product information in Portuguese, and the appointment of a Brazil-registered procurador by foreign manufacturers before homologation can be obtained. CCC marks and SRRC labels do not satisfy these requirements. Engaging a qualified Brazilian regulatory representative is a prerequisite for market entry, not an optional step.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴西要求产品标签标注ANATEL型式认可编号和ANATEL标志，产品信息以葡萄牙语显示，且外国制造商在取得型式认可前须委任巴西注册授权代理人（procurador）。CCC标志和SRRC标签不满足上述要求。委托合格的巴西监管代表是进入市场的前提条件，而非可选步骤。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴西要求產品標籤標注ANATEL型式認可編號和ANATEL標誌，產品信息以葡萄牙語顯示，且外國製造商在取得型式認可前須委任巴西註冊授權代理人（procurador）。CCC標誌和SRRC標籤不滿足上述要求。委託合格的巴西監管代表是進入市場的前提條件，而非可選步驟。
